content: Thunderbird is NOT an SMTP provider. Most Wordpress sites use plugins that provide that service. The eventual email might then be sent to an account where you use Thunderbird to access it, but your problem is within the Wordpress setup. I suggest you post your concerns on a Wordpress forum or solicit assistance from your plugin author page, assuming use of a plugin.
creator: davidsk

content:
Hello there Allan,katzen


Some of these emails do not go to the inbox but are going to 'All Mail' It seems that Gmail is archiving them or using filters Rather, it is not Thunderbird's fault A server sided issue “ skip the inbox “ filter .(archive it).

Looking at that fix If you have corruption, try this: Right-click the inbox, go to Properties, and click Repair Folder

Looking at the filters , gmail Check your email filters in Gmail. Log in to Gmail via a browser, go to Settings > Filters and Blocked Addresses, and check for filters that include the action 'Skip the Inbox (Archive it)

Archiving Check your Gmail inbox settings to ensure you aren't automatically archiving new mail

Check thunderbird messages Check your Thunderbird message filters. Ensure that there are no filters set to move mail to other folders. Go to Tools > Message Filters

unsubscribe from all mail(imap). In Thunderbird, right-click your account name, select Subscribe, and uncheck the [Gmail]/All Mail folder. This prevents Thunderbird from duplicating all inbox mail into a separate folder
creator: Googlethunderbird.
